title: Proxy ratelimit
description:
Restrict the rate of requests Pucora makes to your backends.

See: https://pucora.in/docs/backends/rate-limit/

capacity.title: Capacity
capacity.description:
The capacity according to the [token bucket algorithm](https://pucora.in/docs/throttling/token-bucket/) with a `bucket capacity == tokens added per second` so Pucora is able to allow some bursting on the request rates. Recommended value is `capacity == max_rate`.

See: https://pucora.in/docs/backends/rate-limit/

max_rate.title: Max rate
max_rate.description:
Maximum requests per second you want to accept in this backend. Use decimals for per-hour and per-minute strategies.

See: https://pucora.in/docs/backends/rate-limit/
